rationale: Both independently surface the exact latent gap — the unswept hunyuan_image3_transformer.py:2238 caller of the removed get_cache_scale API — with concrete file/line evidence and fix suggestions, which neither ground-truth reviewer flagged as a blocker. However X then claims this was 'since been addressed on main... see #4810,' which contradicts the given history that this gap wasn't caught until a later issue (#4891); that looks like a fabricated resolution and undercuts an otherwise strong finding, plus it lets X land on a clean APPROVE verdict inconsistent with an unresolved caller. Y instead treats it as an active blocker and issues a 'FOLLOW-UP REQUIRED' verdict, matching reality more faithfully, and its other sweep/nit findings are all grounded in the actual diff/repo state without unsupported claims. Neither candidate reproduces the ground truth's narrow non-blocking ask for a real-checkpoint smoke test, keeping recall modest for both.
